title: 278 SearchPolicy
description: Governed booking SearchPolicy freeze pack. Search truth compiles patient, continuity, accessibility, travel, and route/audience policy inputs into one stable bundle hash.

continuityPreference.description: Continuity preference carried from triage or manage flows.

sitePreference.description: Preferred sites or site clusters in priority order.

accessibilityNeeds.description: Accessibility or accommodation needs that filter or explain booking options.

selectionAudience.description: Audience whose capabilities and fallback posture govern the search.

patientChannelMode.description: Channel mode governing route publication and continuity constraints.

policyBundleHash.description: Compiled policy-bundle hash used by snapshots, offer sessions, and commit paths.

sameBandReorderSlackMinutesByWindow.description: Per window-class slack minutes for same-band reordering.

x-governedInvariants: SearchPolicy is stable input truth; browser-local sort, filters, or calendar mode may not rewrite policyBundleHash.
Selection audience is part of the policy bundle and must match the active capability tuple.
Policy bundle hash is propagated into snapshot, offer session, and booking transaction truth.
